title: prostatic intraepithelial neoplasia high grade
body:
Biopsy results show prostatic intraepithelial neoplasia high grade.

The good news is it is not cancer, the bad news is abnormal cells - Nov 2018.

He noted it was previously believed that prostatic intraepithelial neoplasia high grade caused or was a precursor to cancer but that today’s research doesn’t indicated/validate that correlation.

Just monitor and do another PSA Test in Feb 2019.

Any thoughts?
